metadata.title: Track cost and usage - Claude Code Docs
metadata.description: Learn how to track token usage, deduplicate parallel tool calls, and estimate costs with the Claude Agent SDK.

images.alt: Diagram showing a query producing two steps of messages. Step 1 has four assistant messages sharing the same ID and usage (count once), Step 2 has one assistant message with a new ID, and the final result message shows the estimated total_cost_usd.
